quranLoadError: Couldn't load the Quran. Check your connection.
tapCardWhenCompleted: Tap a card when the prayer is completed.
ayah1: And establish prayer. Indeed, prayer prohibits immorality and wrongdoing.
ayah2: Indeed, prayer has been decreed upon the believers at specified times.
ayah3: And seek help through patience and prayer.
ayah4: So glorify Allah when you reach the evening and when you reach the morning.
ayah5: Recite what has been revealed to you of the Book and establish prayer.
ayah6: O you who believe, bow and prostrate and worship your Lord and do good.
ayah7: And be steadfast in prayer; practice regular charity.
ayah8: Guard strictly your prayers, especially the middle prayer.
ayah9: Successful indeed are the believers who are humble in their prayers.
ayah10: So exalt the name of your Lord, the Most Great.
ayah11: And your Lord says: Call upon Me, I will respond to you.
ayah12: Verily, in the remembrance of Allah do hearts find rest.
ayah13: He is with you wherever you are. And Allah sees what you do.
ayah14: Allah does not burden a soul beyond that it can bear.
ayah15: So verily, with hardship, there is relief.
ayah16: And whoever puts their trust in Allah, He will be enough for them.
ayah18: And We have certainly made the Quran easy to remember.
ayah19: Those who believe and do righteous deeds — they are the best of creatures.
ayah20: And speak to people good words.
ayah21: Indeed, Allah is with the patient.
ayah22: And whoever fears Allah — He will make a way out for him.
ayah23: And do good; indeed, Allah loves the doers of good.
ayah25: And He found you lost and guided you.
ayah26: Allah is the Light of the heavens and the earth.
ayah27: And whoever is grateful — his gratitude is only for himself.
ayah28: And We are closer to him than his jugular vein.
ayah29: Say: He is Allah, the One.
ayah30: Read in the name of your Lord who created.
ayah31: And the Hereafter is better for you than the first life.
hadith1: The key to Paradise is prayer.
hadith2: The best of deeds is prayer at its earliest time.
hadith3: Between a man and disbelief is abandoning prayer.
hadith4: Pray as you have seen me praying.
hadith5: The first matter to be judged on the Day is prayer.
hadith6: Make the last of your prayer at night witr.
hadith7: Whoever prays Fajr is under the protection of Allah.
hadith8: The most beloved deeds to Allah are those done consistently.
hadith9: Supplication is the essence of worship.
hadith10: Allah says: Remember Me and I will remember you.
hadith11: None of you truly believes until he loves for his brother what he loves for himself.
hadith12: The strong believer is better than the weak believer.
hadith13: Be in this world as if you were a stranger or a traveler.
hadith14: Smiling in the face of your brother is charity.
hadith15: Whoever believes in Allah and the Last Day, let him speak good or remain silent.
hadith16: The best among you are those who have the best manners.
hadith17: Do not be angry, and Paradise will be yours.
hadith18: Every act of kindness is charity.
hadith19: Allah is gentle and loves gentleness in all things.
hadith20: He who is not grateful to people is not grateful to Allah.
hadith21: The world is a prison for the believer and a paradise for the disbeliever.
hadith22: Take advantage of five before five: your youth, health, wealth, free time, and life.
hadith23: Whoever follows a path seeking knowledge, Allah will ease a path to Paradise.
hadith26: The best of you are those who learn the Quran and teach it.
hadith27: Feed the hungry, visit the sick, and free the captive.
hadith28: The one who looks after a widow or a poor person is like a warrior in Allah's cause.
hadith29: Leave what makes you doubt for what does not make you doubt.
hadith31: Tie your camel and then put your trust in Allah.
setupPrompt: Please complete your profile to get started with prayer tracking
signOutSubtitle: You can sign back in any time
deleteAccountConfirmMessage:
This will permanently delete your account and all your data. This action cannot be undone.

Are you sure?
signOutConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to sign out?
locationBannerCached: Showing prayer times for last known location. Tap to refresh.
locationBannerUnavailable: Enable location to show accurate prayer times. Tap to allow.
shareText: Alhamdulillah, I completed all 5 prayers today with In Salah.
shareTextWithStreak: Alhamdulillah, all 5 prayers done today — {streak}-day streak with In Salah.
madhabShafiDesc: Asr begins when an object's shadow equals its length
madhabHanafiDesc: Asr begins when the shadow is twice the object's length (later)
aboutDescription: In Salah helps you keep your daily prayers organized with reminders, iqama timing, and missed-prayer tracking.
markMonthConfirm: Mark every prayer in {month} as completed?
tasbeehLaIlahaIllallahMeaning: There is no god but Allah
tapTheCircle: Tap the circle · hold to reset
duaMorningRemembranceTr: We have reached the morning and at this very time the whole kingdom belongs to Allah. All praise is due to Allah. None has the right to be worshipped except Allah alone, without any partner. To Him belongs the dominion and to Him belongs all praise, and He is over all things capable.
duaEveningRemembranceTr: We have reached the evening and at this very time the whole kingdom belongs to Allah. All praise is due to Allah. None has the right to be worshipped except Allah alone, without any partner. To Him belongs the dominion and to Him belongs all praise, and He is over all things capable.
duaSayyidIstighfarTr: O Allah, You are my Lord, none has the right to be worshipped except You, You created me and I am Your servant and I abide by Your covenant and promise as best I can, I take refuge in You from the evil of what I have done. I acknowledge Your favour upon me and I acknowledge my sin, so forgive me, for verily none can forgive sins except You.
duaProtectionFromEvilTr: In the name of Allah, with whose name nothing on earth or in the heavens can cause harm, and He is the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing.
duaOpeningIstiftahTr: Glory is to You O Allah, and praise. Blessed is Your name and exalted is Your majesty. There is none worthy of worship but You.
duaBetweenProstrationsTr: My Lord, forgive me. My Lord, forgive me.
duaAfterTashahhudTr: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the punishment of Hellfire, from the punishment of the grave, from the trials of life and death, and from the evil of the trial of the False Messiah.
duaAfterPrayerTr: I seek the forgiveness of Allah (three times). O Allah, You are Peace and from You comes peace. Blessed are You, O Owner of Majesty and Honour.
duaAyatKursiTr: Allah — there is no deity except Him, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer of existence. Neither drowsiness overtakes Him nor sleep. To Him belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth. Who is it that can intercede with Him except by His permission? He knows what is before them and what will be after them, and they encompass not a thing of His knowledge except for what He wills. His Kursi extends over the heavens and the earth, and their preservation tires Him not. And He is the Most High, the Most Great.
duaAfterEatingTr: All praise is due to Allah who fed me this and provided it for me without any might or power on my part.
duaLeavingHomeTr: In the name of Allah, I place my trust in Allah, and there is no might nor power except with Allah.
duaEnteringHomeTr: In the name of Allah we enter and in the name of Allah we leave, and upon our Lord we place our trust.
duaBeforeSleepingTr: In Your name O Allah, I die and I live.
duaWakingUpTr: All praise is due to Allah, who gave us life after having taken it from us, and unto Him is the resurrection.
duaEnteringMasjidTr: O Allah, open for me the doors of Your mercy.
duaLeavingMasjidTr: O Allah, I ask You from Your bounty.
duaForProtectionTr: I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from the evil of that which He has created.
duaVisitingSickTr: No worry, it is a purification, if Allah wills.
duaForHealingTr: O Allah, Lord of mankind, remove the illness. Cure him, for You are the One who cures. There is no cure except Your cure — a cure that leaves behind no ailment.
duaAgainstAnxietyTr: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from worry and grief, from helplessness and laziness, from cowardice and stinginess, and from the burden of debts and from being overpowered by men.
duaSeekingForgivenessTr: I seek the forgiveness of Allah the Mighty, whom there is none worthy of worship except Him, the Living, the Sustainer, and I turn to Him in repentance.
duaRepentanceYunusTr: There is no deity except You; exalted are You. Indeed, I have been of the wrongdoers.
duaDuaAdamTr: Our Lord, we have wronged ourselves, and if You do not forgive us and have mercy upon us, we will surely be among the losers.
duaStartingJourneyTr: Glory to Him who has subjected this to us, and we could never have it by our efforts. And to our Lord we shall surely return.
duaReturningTravelTr: We return, repenting, worshipping, and praising our Lord.
duaForGuidanceTr: Our Lord, give us in this world that which is good and in the Hereafter that which is good, and protect us from the punishment of the Fire.
duaForPatienceTr: Our Lord, pour upon us patience and plant firmly our feet and give us victory over the disbelieving people.
duaForKnowledgeTr: My Lord, increase me in knowledge.
duaForParentsTr: My Lord, have mercy upon them as they brought me up when I was small.
duaForOffspringTr: My Lord, grant me from Yourself a good offspring. Indeed, You are the Hearer of supplication.
duaIbrahimTr: My Lord, make me an establisher of prayer, and from my descendants. Our Lord, and accept my supplication.
signInToSync: Sign in to sync your prayers
joinCommunity: Join the community of In Salah
noInternet: No internet connection. Check your network and try again.
sendTestNotificationSubtitle: Shows immediately — confirms permissions and channel work
notificationsBlocked: Notifications are disabled in system settings.
enableNotificationsPrompt: Open phone settings and turn on notifications so prayer reminders arrive in your notification shade.
testNotificationBody: If you see this, reminders are working.
testNotificationQueued: Test sent. If it appears, reminders can surface.
batteryOptimizationSubtitle: Remove battery limits so reminders arrive on time
batteryOptimizationPrompt: To make prayer reminders fire exactly on time, turn off battery optimization for In Salah. On Xiaomi, Huawei and similar devices, also enable “Autostart” in the app settings.
onboardingDesc1: Track your daily prayers, never miss a salah, and grow closer to Allah with every prayer.
onboardingDesc2: Get precise adhan and iqama times calculated for your exact location using trusted methods like Umm Al-Qura and Muslim World League.
onboardingSubtitle3: Day by day, prayer by prayer
onboardingDesc3: Review your prayer history with daily and monthly views. See lifetime statistics and identify which prayers you miss most.
onboardingDesc4: Receive notifications before each prayer time. Customize reminders for each salah individually.
